query: SELECT sc.id, sc.pickingOrderId, sc.customerOrderNumber, sc.operatorId, sc.status, sc.tenantId, sc.createdAt, po.orderNumber FROM stageChecks sc LEFT JOIN pickingOrders po ON sc.pickingOrderId = po.id WHERE sc.status = 'in_progress';
